'''Miner's Town''' was a town on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]]. The settlement was founded to support the [[Miner/Legends|miners]] who worked in the planet's [[Mon Gazza Spice Mines|spice mines]].

{{City-stub}}
